description_long: This is a large, freestanding wardrobe cabinet with a classic design, featuring ornate crown molding along the top edge and a rectangular body. The front face has two sliding doors, one of which incorporates a large, dark-tinted glass panel, while the other is solid. Both doors are equipped with small, dark handles for easy operation. The cabinet is finished in a smooth, light color, likely white or off-white, and stands on a flat base. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the cabinet's substantial depth and sturdy construction. This type of cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as apartment hallways, building lobbies, or garages for storage purposes.
description: A large, classic wardrobe cabinet with sliding doors, one featuring a dark glass panel and ornate crown molding, finished in a smooth light color.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat surface with subtle panel lines and no visible handles or glass.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid panel with the crown molding detail visible at the top.
description_view_2: The front view displays two sliding doors, one with a dark glass panel and both with small handles, as well as decorative crown molding.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain, solid panel and the crown molding at the top.
